free_text: Cascade gamma-decay of the 196Pt compound state excited
by capture of thermal neutrons in 195Pt
Work was done by support of RFBR #93-02-16093 .
The article was checked, BIB information was updated.
according to a comment of N.Otsuka (NDS, IAEA).
STATUS was corrected for new rules.

Cascade energy =Sum of two gamma energies E1+E2
